metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students develop advanced graphic design skills focusing on print and digital design, layout principles, typography, and Adobe Creative Suite workflows. This course combines technical proficiency with design theory and industry practices.
metadata.general_description: An applied course in print and digital design, layout, typography, and professional graphic design workflows.

big_ideas.statement: Graphic design communicates ideas and information through strategic visual choices that influence audience perception and behaviour.
big_ideas.elaboration: Understanding design principles—hierarchy, balance, contrast—enables creation of effective visual communication across media.

big_ideas.statement: Typography shapes both readability and aesthetic impact, making font and text design critical elements of graphic communication.
big_ideas.elaboration: Expertise in typography—selection, spacing, hierarchy—elevates design quality and effectiveness.

big_ideas.statement: Print and digital design require different technical approaches while sharing fundamental design principles and aesthetic considerations.
big_ideas.elaboration: Understanding medium-specific requirements and constraints enables creation of designs that work effectively in their intended context.

big_ideas.statement: Professional graphic design requires technical proficiency, creative vision, and understanding of industry standards and client needs.
big_ideas.elaboration: Mastery of design tools and workflows enables translating concepts into polished, professional deliverables.

competencies.raw: Design print and digital layouts that communicate effectively
i_can_statements: I can apply design principles to create hierarchical layouts
I can design for specific print formats and specifications
I can design responsive layouts for digital platforms
I can create cohesive multi-page designs and documents

competencies.raw: Develop visual identity and branding materials
i_can_statements: I can create logos and brand marks
I can develop brand guidelines and style systems
I can design brand identity across applications
I can maintain visual consistency in design systems

competencies.raw: Design typography solutions that serve both aesthetic and functional purposes
i_can_statements: I can select and pair fonts appropriately
I can design typographic hierarchies
I can optimize typography for readability and aesthetics
I can create custom lettering and type treatments

competencies.raw: Evaluate design solutions and recommend improvements
i_can_statements: I can assess design effectiveness and usability
I can evaluate color schemes and visual balance
I can analyze typography and composition choices
I can provide and receive design feedback

competencies.raw: Use Adobe Creative Suite applications proficiently
i_can_statements: I can use Photoshop for image editing and manipulation
I can use Illustrator for vector design and illustration
I can use InDesign for layout and publication design
I can integrate files between Creative Suite applications

competencies.raw: Prepare files for print production with appropriate specifications
i_can_statements: I can set up documents with correct colour modes and resolution
I can prepare files for print including bleed and crop marks
I can work with colour management and CMYK colour
I can create print-ready PDFs and proofs

competencies.raw: Create web-optimized graphics and digital assets
i_can_statements: I can optimize images for web use
I can create graphics in appropriate digital formats
I can prepare responsive graphics for multiple screen sizes
I can create animations and interactive graphics
I can complete designs to professional specifications
I can create design mockups and presentations
I can deliver files in appropriate formats
I can manage design assets and file organization

competencies.raw: Master Adobe Creative Suite tools and features
i_can_statements: I can use advanced features in Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign
I can work with layers, masks, and effects
I can use automation and scripting in design workflows
I can troubleshoot and optimize software performance

competencies.raw: Use colour management and production technologies
i_can_statements: I can manage colour profiles and colour spaces
I can work with pantone and spot colours
I can calibrate monitors and maintain colour accuracy
I can use colour theory and colour picker tools
I can install and manage fonts
I can work with web fonts and custom typefaces
I can use typography plug-ins and features
I can understand font formats and licensing

competencies.raw: Evaluate emerging design technologies and tools
i_can_statements: I can assess new design software and tools
I can understand web design and CSS basics
I can evaluate 3D design and rendering technologies
I can identify tools and technologies for design innovation

areas.name: Print Design and Production
topics: Print formats: business cards, brochures, posters, packaging
Print specifications: resolution, colour modes, bleeds
File preparation and print production workflows

areas.name: Digital Design and Web Workflows
topics: Digital design principles and responsive design
